attempt.claim: Erdos #417: lean/Vela/Erdos417.lean formalizes the finite-set comparison V'(x)<=V(x) and proves the exact decomposition V(x)=V'(x)+hiddenCount(x), where hiddenCount counts totient values v<=x whose preimages all lie above x. This isolates the official residual as an asymptotic question about hidden totients and does not prove the limit exists or exceeds 1.
attempt.detail: {"artifacts":["lean/Vela/Erdos417.lean","scripts/verify_erdos417_hidden_decomposition.py"],"scope":{"does_not_prove":["existence of lim V(x)/V'(x)","strict inequality of the limit above 1","Erdos's stronger suggestion that the limit may be infinite"],"lean_file":"lean/Vela/Erdos417.lean","new_definitions":["domainTotientValues","boundedTotientValues","hiddenTotientValues","VprimeCount","VCount","hiddenCount"],"new_theorems":["domainTotientValues_subset_boundedTotientValues","VprimeCount_le_VCount","mem_hiddenTotientValues_iff","VCount_eq_VprimeCount_add_hiddenCount"],"proves":["The finite set counted by V'(x) is a subset of the finite set counted by V(x).","A value lies in the gap V(x)-V'(x) exactly when it is a totient value at most x and no preimage at most x realizes it.","The finite counts decompose exactly as V(x)=V'(x)+hiddenCount(x)."],"target":"#417 hidden-totient decomposition"},"sources":[{"source":"Erdos Problems #417","url":"https://www.erdosproblems.com/417","used_for":"official statement, open status, and the recorded trivial inequality V'(x)<=V(x)"},{"source":"Erdos Problems #417 discussion thread","url":"https://www.erdosproblems.com/forum/thread/417","used_for":"non-authoritative discussion motivating the hidden first-preimage formulation"}]}
